questionHtml: Sketch the function h(t) for 0≤t≤5, clearly labelling the coordinates of the maximum and minimum points.
markschemeHtml:
Maximum point labelled with correct coordinates.         A1

At least one minimum point labelled. Coordinates seen for any minimum points must be correct.         A1

Correct shape with an attempt at symmetry and “concave up" evident as it approaches the minimum points. Graph must be drawn in the given domain.         A1

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the function h(t) for 0≤t≤5, clearly labelling the coordinates of the maximum and minimum points.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 2.4—Key features of graphs, intersections using technology
